name: NetPosa Technologies, Ltd.
summary: NetPosa Technologies, Ltd. engages in the research and development of video management system platforms in China and internationally. It offers video networking systems, such as power video networking platforms, power social video resource pooling platforms, social resource access systems, mobile video surveillance platforms, comprehensive maintenance management platforms, servers, storage-type network hard disk recorders, network video coders and decoders, and matrix network control keyboards; and video cloud storage and video structured server products. The company also provides video image analysis systems, smart community security and protection systems, hyper-convergence live-action command systems, vehicle big data platforms, police big-data platforms, Internet human intelligence management platforms, and physical security information management platforms; video investigation applications; and dynamic face recognition systems. Its products are used in the urban public security, intelligent transportation and city, rail transit, intelligent building, and home security sectors. The company was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.
